task_completion.description: Log in to Redmine as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Redmine interface is visible, showing the user is logged in as 'admin' (e.g., 'Logged in as admin' in the top right corner).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Workflow Field permissions page and select the correct Role and Tracker.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Workflows' administration page is open on the 'Field permissions' tab. The Role dropdown is set to 'Developer' and the Tracker dropdown is set to 'Support'.

task_completion.description: Set the Assignee field to Required for the Feedback status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the field permissions matrix, the dropdown at the intersection of the 'Assignee' row and the 'Feedback' column is set to 'Required'.

task_completion.description: Set the Priority field to Read-only for the Feedback status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the field permissions matrix, the dropdown at the intersection of the 'Priority' row and the 'Feedback' column is set to 'Read-only'.

task_completion.description: Set the Subject field to Read-only for the Feedback status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the field permissions matrix, the dropdown at the intersection of the 'Subject' row and the 'Feedback' column is set to 'Read-only'.
A green success banner (e.g., 'Successful update.') is visible at the top of the Workflows page after clicking the Save button.

integrity.description: The agent used the Redmine web GUI to configure the workflow.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Redmine interface, rather than terminal windows executing SQL commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not indiscriminately modify all fields to bypass specific checks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Other fields in the 'Feedback' column, specifically the 'Description' field, remain blank/unmodified (not set to required or read-only).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Redmine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the actual Redmine application with standard styling and URL, not a text editor or locally mocked HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Role: Developer. Target Tracker: Support. Target Status: Feedback. Required constraints: Assignee must be 'Required', Priority must be 'Read-only', Subject must be 'Read-only'. Anti-gaming: The Description field must remain unmodified (blank/none) to prove the agent didn't indiscriminately change all fields.
